The '''Davani family''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] family from [[Beheboth]], apparently living in the city of [[Hebofyrd]]. It consisted of [[Nils Davani|Nils]], [[Haryette Davani|Haryette]], and [[Myrette Davani|Myrette]].
